[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 11/29 (Tue)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kaede

Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 11/29 (Tue) After Maintenance – 12/13 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

* The introduction image will be released on 11/28(Mon).![t9JEIwXLZZtiDN8uMVuPLe4RWeWvCccH.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/t9JEIwXLZZtiDN8uMVuPLe4RWeWvCccH.jpg)
